title: Daily Dividend Report: Alamos Gold, Gaming And Leisure Properties, Deere, Quanta Services, ChampionX
Quanta Services Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: HOUSTON , Aug. 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend to stockholders of $0.08 per share, or a rate of $0.32 per share on an annualized basis. The dividend is payable on October 13, 2023, to stockholders of record as of October 2, 2023.

title: Don't Sleep on These 7 Growth Stocks That Will Mint Millionaires
text: Nearly everyone in the financial media missed what was by far the most important line of  Fed Chairman Jerome Powell's speech. Specifically, Powell said, “We are prepared to raise rates further if appropriate, and intend to hold policy at a restrictive level until we are confident that inflation is moving sustainably down toward our objective.

title: Breaking Down the Construction & Housing Earnings Picture
text: The housing and construction space is one of the economy's most interest-rate-sensitive areas. Unsurprisingly, the Fed's extraordinary tightening cycle has been impacting the sector's earnings picture.

title: Stock Screen Finds These Growth Stocks Outperforming The S&P 500
text: This IBD stock screener identified three growth stocks with relative strength lines at new highs. One hit a 52-week high on Wednesday.

title: Time to Buy the Surge in These Infrastructure Stocks?
text: The services of many infrastructure-related companies are in high demand and a few of these stocks have started to pop after reporting their Q2 results this month.

title: Quanta (PWR) Q2 Earnings Lag, Margin Up, 2023 Guidance Raised
text: Quanta Services' (PWR) second quarter results benefits from strength across its segments.

title: Quanta Services (PWR) Q2 Earnings Miss Estimates
text: Quanta Services (PWR) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.65 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.67 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.54 per share a year ago.

title: QUANTA SERVICES REPORTS SECOND QUARTER 2023 RESULTS
text: Second  Quarter Consolidated Revenues of $5.05 Billion* Second  Quarter GAAP Diluted EPS of $1.12* and Adjusted Diluted EPS of $1.65* Net Income Attributable to Common Stock of $165.9 Million* and Adjusted EBITDA of $472.1 Million* Remaining Performance Obligations of $12.5 Billion* and Total Backlog of $27.2 Billion* Raising Full-Year 2023 Revenue, Adjusted EBITDA and EPS Expectations * = Record quarterly or record second quarter result HOUSTON , Aug. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) today announced results for the three months ended June 30, 2023. Revenues in the second quarter of 2023 were $5.05 billion compared to revenues of $4.23 billion in the second quarter of 2022, and net income attributable to common stock was $165.9 million, or $1.12 per diluted share, in the second quarter of 2023 compared to net income attributable to common stock of $88.0 million, or $0.59 per diluted share, in the second quarter of 2022.

title: Renewable Drive to Benefit Quanta Services' (PWR) Q2 Earnings
text: Seasonality is likely to have impacted Quanta Services' (PWR) Q2 results despite more demand for infrastructure solutions that help support customers' energy-transition initiatives and modernization.
